message:
feat(agents): Implement agents_list and agents_status commands

Replaces stub implementations with full functionality for managing
AI coding agent integrations.

**agents_list command:**
- Detects installed AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.)
- Shows detection status, version, config path for each agent
- Displays RCH hook installation status (Installed/NeedsUpdate/NotInstalled)
- Supports --all flag to show all known agents vs only detected ones
- JSON output format for programmatic access
- Human-readable output with status indicators and color coding

**agents_status command:**
- Shows detailed status for a specific agent or all detected agents
- Validates agent name against known AgentKind variants
- Provides focused single-agent view or comprehensive multi-agent status
- JSON and human-readable output formats

Integrates with crate::agent module for AgentKind, HookStatus, and
detection utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
